concepts.name: AES
concepts.description: Advanced Encryption Standard, symmetric block cipher with 128, 192, or 256-bit keys

concepts.name: RSA Algorithm
concepts.description: Public-key cryptosystem based on integer factorization difficulty

concepts.name: Public Key
concepts.description: Publicly accessible key in asymmetric cryptography for encryption/verification

concepts.name: Digital Signature
concepts.description: Cryptographic mechanism for authenticity and non-repudiation

concepts.name: Blockchain
concepts.description: Distributed ledger with cryptographically linked blocks

concepts.name: Zero Knowledge Proof
concepts.description: Cryptographic proof that reveals no information beyond statement validity

concepts.name: Elliptic Curve
concepts.description: Mathematical structure used in elliptic curve cryptography

concepts.name: SHA-256
concepts.description: Cryptographic hash function producing 256-bit hash values

concepts.name: Symmetric Encryption
concepts.description: Encryption using the same key for encryption and decryption

concepts.name: Hash Function
concepts.description: Mathematical function mapping arbitrary data to fixed-size values

concepts.name: Lexer
concepts.description: Tokenizes source code into lexical tokens for parsing

concepts.name: Parser
concepts.description: Analyzes token sequences and builds abstract syntax trees

concepts.name: AST
concepts.description: Abstract Syntax Tree representing program structure

concepts.name: Code Generation
concepts.description: Translates intermediate representation to target machine code

concepts.name: Optimization Pass
concepts.description: Compiler phase improving code performance or size

concepts.name: JIT
concepts.description: Just-In-Time compilation during runtime execution

concepts.name: Bytecode
concepts.description: Intermediate code representation for virtual machines

concepts.name: Compiler Frontend
concepts.description: Source language analysis including lexing, parsing, and semantic analysis

concepts.name: Compiler Backend
concepts.description: Target code generation and machine-specific optimizations

concepts.name: Intermediate Representation
concepts.description: Language-neutral code representation for optimization

concepts.name: Consensus
concepts.description: Agreement protocol in distributed systems

concepts.name: Paxos
concepts.description: Consensus algorithm for unreliable networks

concepts.name: Raft
concepts.description: Consensus algorithm designed for understandability

concepts.name: CAP Theorem
concepts.description: Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance trade-off

concepts.name: Sharding
concepts.description: Horizontal database partitioning across multiple machines

concepts.name: Replication
concepts.description: Data duplication across multiple nodes for availability

concepts.name: Eventual Consistency
concepts.description: Consistency model where updates propagate asynchronously

concepts.name: Byzantine Fault Tolerance
concepts.description: System resilience to arbitrary node failures

concepts.name: Vector Clock
concepts.description: Logical clock for ordering events in distributed systems

concepts.name: Gossip Protocol
concepts.description: Epidemic communication pattern for distributed coordination

concepts.name: Type System
concepts.description: Language rules for assigning types to program constructs

concepts.name: Lambda Calculus
concepts.description: Formal system for function definition and application

concepts.name: Garbage Collection
concepts.description: Automatic memory management reclaiming unused objects

concepts.name: Closures
concepts.description: Functions capturing variables from enclosing scope

concepts.name: Monads
concepts.description: Functional programming pattern for composable computations

concepts.name: Pattern Matching
concepts.description: Structural comparison and destructuring of data

concepts.name: Polymorphism
concepts.description: Code working with multiple types through common interface

concepts.name: Higher-Order Functions
concepts.description: Functions that operate on other functions

concepts.name: Immutability
concepts.description: Data structures that cannot be modified after creation

concepts.name: Tail Recursion
concepts.description: Recursive calls in tail position for stack optimization

concepts.name: ALU
concepts.description: Arithmetic Logic Unit performing mathematical operations

concepts.name: Register
concepts.description: High-speed storage location within CPU

concepts.name: Cache Line
concepts.description: Fixed-size block of data transferred between cache levels

concepts.name: Pipeline
concepts.description: Instruction processing in overlapping stages

concepts.name: Branch Prediction
concepts.description: CPU predicting conditional branch outcomes

concepts.name: FPGA
concepts.description: Field-Programmable Gate Array for reconfigurable logic

concepts.name: SIMD
concepts.description: Single Instruction Multiple Data parallel processing

concepts.name: RISC
concepts.description: Reduced Instruction Set Computer design philosophy

concepts.name: CISC
concepts.description: Complex Instruction Set Computer design philosophy

concepts.name: Superscalar
concepts.description: CPU executing multiple instructions per clock cycle
